items.title: Mobile_Robot_URDF Maker v4.0 is here!
event-triggered MCAP clips from a continuous ROS 2 recording (preroll included)
items.summary:
Sharing a tool we just open-sourced, in case it’s useful to anyone else thinking about the same approach.

The problem: on a robot, the data worth keeping is sparse — a few seconds around a disengagement, a near-miss, a moment perception got it wrong. But you can’t know an event mattered until after it’s already started, and a useful clip

items.title: ROS2 ROS Lyrical Luth - Patch Release 1 (2026/06/23)
items.summary: These are the binary packages for ROS Lyrical Luth Patch Release 1 (2026/06/23) For runtime dependencies, see the binary package installation instructions . Your system must be up-to-date to be compatible with the downloaded packages. Note: ignore the Source code links because they don't contain the source code for ROS 2 (they're auto-generated by GitHub). Instead, grab the binary package for your platform. If you're interested in building from source, consult the building from source instructio

items.title: NVIDIA Brings Trusted, 24/7 AI Agents to Telecom Operations
items.summary: Telecom operators have seen remarkable returns from using generative AI to automate network management, customer care and back-office operations.
